commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Workboard board namespaces, stats and recovery tools/RPCs, stricter created-card manifest validation, worker-context enrichment, docs, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +508, Tests +163, Docs +5. Total +676 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source. Current main accepts any existing `createdCardIds`, while PR head requires reciprocal links, and PR head expands diagnostic action types without updating the normalizer.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The protected maintainer label and created-card contract change require maintainer review before any automated repair path should take over.

target.title: feat(workboard): add board ops recovery metadata
target.body:
## Summary
- Add Workboard board namespaces, board stats, and board-aware idempotency for agent/tool workflows.
- Add operator recovery tools/RPCs for promote, reassign, and reclaim, with stale diagnostics and stopped-run handling.
- Harden completed-card manifests so created cards must be reciprocally linked, and enrich worker context with parent results plus recent same-board assignee work.

## Verification
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/workboard/src/store.test.ts extensions/workboard/src/gateway.test.ts extensions/workboard/src/tools.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- `pnpm check:changed` on Testbox `tbx_01ksvpfgckctprmnbbdfc05h36` passed before the final autoreview fixes; final rerun `tbx_01ksvr366msqtm348p13qcwrh5` was canceled after stalling in `pnpm install`, with final focused tests/tsgo/autoreview rerun locally after the fixes.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Workboard now has board-scoped coordination metadata, recovery commands, stricter created-card manifests, and richer worker context.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout plus Blacksmith Testbox changed-lane run.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: see Verification.
Evidence after fix: Workboard store/gateway/tool/controller tests passed; core/extensions tsgo passed; autoreview clean.
Observed result after fix: board stats, recovery operations, manifest validation, and worker context regressions pass their new tests.
What was not tested: live Gateway UI interaction for the new operator RPCs; final broad Testbox rerun did not finish because install stalled, so final proof is focused local plus prior full Testbox pass.
target.author: steipete
